title: Four Point Five Seconds
summary: At the observatory, Ada experiences extreme subjective time dilation inside a measured 4.5-second event window.

narrative.newInfo: Subjective duration and objective instrumentation diverge in a single timestamped event.
narrative.dripHook: If the clocks are right, something beyond ordinary cognition occurred.
narrative.payoffDelivered: Mystery upgrades from vague intuition to hard event.
narrative.notes: Cadence: first peak. Function: anomaly becomes undeniable. Exit: testability introduced via timestamp/data.

rewardTokens.description: Subjective duration and objective time window conflict sharply.
Reader model shifts from oddity to real event candidate.
